description: Standardize patient phone numbers in the MedinTux database (table `fchpat`, column `FchPat_Tel1`) to a 10-digit format by removing spaces, dots, dashes, and slashes. Generate a CSV report of any phone numbers that are not exactly 10 digits long after cleaning and save it to `/home/ga/invalid_phones.csv` with headers `guid,nom,telephone`. You have root access to the MySQL database `DrTuxTest`.
